rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent Robert A. Luries Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Respondent's Motion for Attorney's Fees and Costs is denied without prejudice, to afford counsel the opportunity to prove specific documentation to allow the Court to determine how much time each individual attorney spent on the matter, what specific tasks each attorney performed, what the billing rate was for each attorney who worked on the matter, whether the overall time spent on the matter was reasonable or whether it was overstaffed, and what the prevailing market rates are for partner and mid-level associates. Alternatively, the parties could seek to resolve this matter by mediation. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, April 19, 2017.
